global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear focus on travel services.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel booking service with a discount offer.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: The logo 'DriftPass' is prominently displayed in bold, white letters at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The main headline reads 'Book your next trip' in large, white font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: The subheadline 'Hotels + flights in one tap' is displayed below the main headline in a smaller, white font.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small, bold text shows '-30%' in white, indicating a discount, positioned at the bottom left.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Watch now' in white is located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in lighter shades of blue are scattered in the background, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: An abstract shape in the center of the ad, possibly a placeholder for an image or icon.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: The text 'Hotels + flights in one tap' is emphasized in the body text area, reinforcing the service offered.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with 'Watch now' text encourages user interaction, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Watch now text
elements.description: The text 'Watch now' is displayed in a smaller font at the bottom of the ad, inviting immediate action.

elements.label: Discount percentage
elements.description: The text '-30%' is shown in bold, indicating a discount, positioned at the bottom left.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and modern, DriftPass, travel booking, discount offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline and subheadline in the center, with the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip, Hotels + flights in one tap, DriftPass, Watch now, -30%
